# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure AD tenant ID"
      }
    },
    "appServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the primary application service principal"
      }
    },
    "backendServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the backend service principal"
      }
    },
    "devOpsServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the DevOps pipeline service principal"
      }
    },
    "devTeamGroupObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the developer team AAD group"
      }
    },
    "enableSoftDelete": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "softDeleteRetentionInDays": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 90
    },
    "enablePurgeProtection": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "networkAclDefaultAction": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Deny",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Allow",
        "Deny"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Default network ACL action. Use 'Deny' to restrict access to allowed networks only."
      }
    },
    "allowedIpRanges": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "List of allowed IP ranges in CIDR notation for Key Vault access"
      }
    },
    "allowedSubnetResourceIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "List of allowed virtual network subnet resource IDs"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "secretReadPermissions": [
      "get",
      "list"
    ],
    "secretManagePermissions": [
      "get",
      "list",
      "set",
      "delete",
      "recover",
      "backup",
      "restore"
    ],
    "copy": [
      {
        "name": "ipRules",
        "count": "[length(parameters('allowedIpRanges'))]",
        "input": {
          "value": "[parameters('allowedIpRanges')[copyIndex('ipRules')]]"
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "virtualNetworkRules",
        "count": "[length(parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds'))]",
        "input": {
          "id": "[parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds')[copyIndex('virtualNetworkRules')]]"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "standard"
        },
        "enableSoftDelete": "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]",
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]",
        "enablePurgeProtection": "[parameters('enablePurgeProtection')]",
        "enableRbacAuthorization": false,
        "enabledForDeployment": false,
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": false,
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": false,
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "[parameters('networkAclDefaultAction')]",
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "ipRules": "[variables('ipRules')]",
          "virtualNetworkRules": "[variables('virtualNetworkRules')]"
        },
        "accessPolicies": [
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('appServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": "[variables('secretReadPermissions')]",
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('backendServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": "[variables('secretReadPermissions')]",
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('devOpsServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": "[variables('secretManagePermissions')]",
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('devTeamGroupObjectId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": "[variables('secretReadPermissions')]",
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/diagnosticSettings",
      "apiVersion": "2021-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '/Microsoft.Insights/', 'auditLogs')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "logs": [
          {
            "category": "AuditEvent",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ],
        "metrics": [
          {
            "category": "AllMetrics",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
    },
    "securityNotes": {
      "type": "object",
      "value": {
        "reminder": "Review and tighten access policies before production deployment",
        "recommendations": [
          "Remove developer team group access policy in production",
          "Restrict DevOps service principal to only 'get' and 'set' permissions",
          "Ensure networkAcls defaultAction is set to 'Deny' with explicit IP and subnet allowlists",
          "Consider migrating to RBAC authorization (enableRbacAuthorization: true) for finer-grained control",
          "Enable private endpoint for production workloads",
          "Verify diagnostic settings are forwarded to a Log Analytics workspace or SIEM"
        ]
      }
    }
  }
}
